title: Fast onboarding
body: The onboarding checklist was clear and our team imported the first workspace in less than a day.

title: Confusing billing
body: The invoice language was confusing and it took three emails to understand which add-ons we were paying for.

title: Reliable automations
body: Automations have been reliable for recurring approvals and saved our account managers several hours each week.

title: Weak reporting filters
body: The reporting page needs better filters because regional managers still export CSVs for basic breakdowns.

title: Helpful support
body: Support answered a permissions question in under an hour and included screenshots we could forward internally.

title: Slow bulk edits
body: Bulk editing large customer lists feels slow and sometimes leaves users unsure whether changes were saved.

title: Good admin controls
body: Role permissions are flexible enough for our managers without giving everyone full admin access.

title: Needs better onboarding emails
body: The product is useful, but the onboarding emails assume too much prior knowledge for new analysts.

title: Clean integration setup
body: Connecting the CRM integration was straightforward and the field mapping screen caught several mistakes before sync.

title: Mobile view is limited
body: Managers like the desktop dashboard, but the mobile view hides too many details for quick approvals.

title: Search works well
body: Search finds old customer notes quickly and has reduced duplicate requests to our support team.

title: Export formatting issue
body: Exports include the right data, but the formatting changes between downloads and creates cleanup work.

title: Strong audit trail
body: The audit trail is easy to follow and helped our compliance team answer questions during review.

title: Feature request for templates
body: We need reusable workflow templates so each department does not rebuild the same approval process.

title: Notification noise
body: Notifications are useful but too noisy by default, especially for users copied on multiple workflows.

title: Positive team adoption
body: Most of our team adopted it quickly because the main task queue is simple and easy to scan.

title: SAML setup friction
body: SAML eventually worked, but the setup documentation skipped a few identity-provider details.

title: Clear customer timeline
body: The customer timeline gives account managers the full context before renewal calls.

title: Needs faster dashboard loading
body: Dashboards with several months of data can take long enough that managers stop using them live.

title: Useful saved views
body: Saved views are a small feature but make weekly pipeline reviews much easier to repeat.
